title: Affirm (AFRM) Q1 2024 Earnings Call Transcript
text:
Affirm (AFRM) Q1 2024 Earnings Call Summary

Key Metrics

Financial Performance:
- GMV growth accelerated sequentially
- Revenue less transaction costs significantly exceeded guidance
- 28% GMV growth and 37% revenue growth reported
- Non-transaction operating expenses reduced by $50 million year-over-year
- Adjusted operating margin guidance raised to approximately 5% for full year

Business Highlights:
- Strong credit outcomes maintained
- Market share gains continued
- Shopify partnership volume accelerated again
- Affirm Card GMV grew from $130 million to $224 million quarter-over-quarter

Forward Guidance

Management indicated Q2 growth would decelerate due to tougher comparable periods. The company noted that major enterprise partner programs are maturing, expecting "a little bit less growth this year than we had in the last quarter."

Strategic Developments

Affirm Card: Described as "very new" with substantial room for growth. Management emphasized focusing on comprehension and user education before aggressive expansion.

B2B Initiatives: Amazon partnership for small business lending launched, with leadership indicating this represents a multi-partner opportunity rather than a one-off initiative.

Brick-and-Mortar: Expanding physical retail presence, with the card expected to "supercharge" offline transaction capabilities.
